el_maestro: Same guide, same philosophy — 'To name is to create'
universal_macias_works: El bello animal indefinido → The Beautiful Undefined Animal
El pájaro al revés → The Bird in Reverse
Historia de peces → Story of Fish
Piel de asno y Padremío → Donkey Skin and MyFather
Casa de bifloras → House of Bifloras
Las muertes de Jung → The Deaths of Jung
el_maestro_quotes_english: The word of the heart is not spoken. It is lived.
Silence is not the absence of the word, but its home.
A name is what separates a thing from nothing.
